project.name: RailTrailsMap
project.description: A map showing cycleways on abandoned railway lines

tags.description: For a way to be rendered, it needs to have both a cycling indicator and a railway indicator. This is one of the railway indicators
For a way to be rendered, it needs to have both a cycling indicator and a railway indicator. This is one of the railway indicators
This is a sufficient way to render the way as a railtrail, regardless of other tags on the way.
This is a sufficient way to render the way as a railtrail, regardless of other tags on the way.

Tagging a cycleway-relation with railtrail=yes indicates that it mostly follows the former railway. Contained ways on the railway bed (determined by tags on the way) will be rendered more prominently than ways that don't show any railway.
For a way to be rendered, it needs to have both a cycling indicator and a railway indicator. This is one of the cycling indicators
For a way to be rendered, it needs to have both a cycling indicator and a railway indicator. This is one of the cycling indicators
For a way to be rendered, it needs to have both a cycling indicator and a railway indicator. This is a cycling indicators if combined with bicycle=designated
For a way to be rendered, it needs to have both a cycling indicator and a railway indicator. This is a cycling indicators if combined with highway=path
For a way to be rendered, it needs to have both a cycling indicator and a railway indicator. This is a cycling indicators if combined with bicycle=yes or a smooth surface indicator
For a way to be rendered, it needs to have both a cycling indicator and a railway indicator. This is a cycling indicators if combined with highway=track
